
Y-axis barplot by LC and LL seperatly for MAU and MMU
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)

# Read data
df <- MAU_MMU_LL %>% filter(!name %in% c("ENSEMBLE_SIMPLE_MEAN", "ENSEMBLE_TRIMMED_MEAN"))

# Prepare data
df2 <- df %>%
  select(name, MAU, MMU) %>%
  mutate(
    model = case_when(
      str_ends(name, "_LC") ~ "LC",
      str_ends(name, "_LL") ~ "LL",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    technique = str_remove(name, "_LC$|_LL$")
  )

# Technique order (adjust if needed)
technique_order <- c(
  "RWD", "ARIMA", "DPLM", "VAR", "STARIMA",
  "SDPLM_QML", "SDPLM_GMM", "LSDPLM_GMM", "ESTF"
)
all_techs <- unique(df2$technique)
technique_order <- c(intersect(technique_order, all_techs),
                     setdiff(all_techs, technique_order))

# Long format
plot_df <- df2 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(MAU, MMU), names_to = "metric", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(
    technique = factor(technique, levels = rev(technique_order)),
    metric = factor(metric, levels = c("MAU", "MMU")),
    model = factor(model, levels = c("LC", "LL")),
    label = formatC(value, format = "f", digits = 4)
  )

# Parameters
dodge_width <- 0.8
label_margin <- 0.0015
x_limit <- 0.03

make_panel <- function(df_model, model_name) {
  ggplot(df_model, aes(y = technique, x = value, fill = metric, group = metric)) +
    geom_col(position = position_dodge2(width = dodge_width), width = 0.7) +
    geom_text(
      aes(x = -label_margin, label = label),
      position = position_dodge2(width = dodge_width),
      hjust = 1,
      size = 3
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(MAU = "blue", MMU = "red"),
                      name = "Metric") +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-label_margin * 2.3, x_limit)) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = seq(0, x_limit, by = 0.01),
      labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.01)
    ) +
    labs(x = "Metric value", y = NULL, title = model_name) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
}

p_lc <- make_panel(plot_df, "LL")
print(p_lc)

```
